tweet.text: RT @BigCor17: Thanks @TheGarfoose for writing such an insightful book on both baseball and life. Couldn't put #biggerthanthegame down!
RT @TheRealBrenty84: @TheGarfoose is probably the best writer I have ever read. Cannot put his books down! #talent #bestseller #biggerthant…
RT @LeeAnne__: @TheGarfoose Finished Bigger then the Game in 1 day. Loved it!! Thank you for another great read.
RT @MoRells86: Just got my autographed copy of #BiggerThanTheGame from @learnedowl, & it came with a signed @TheGarfoose card! Thx! http://…
